title: Purplefied GUI
description: This pack changes Minecrafts GUI to be Purple!
body:
# Purplefied GUI by Drqad

## Features

### Simple retexturing of many GUI aspects such as:
- Buttons
- Hotbar & XP bar
- Hearts & Hunger
- Sweeping explosions and crit particles

## Installation
Simply drag and drop the .zip file into your `resourcepacks` folder.  
Or use the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app), then enable it in the options.

## Requirements?
None, but I recommend the [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) as well as the [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) mod for colored level indicator and loading screen.
